gates.description: DESCRIPTION, citation, CodeMeta, Zenodo, license, and reproducibility metadata are synchronized and valid.
The canonical installed public API baseline is unchanged and all API compatibility checks pass.
The exact source tarball passes clean R CMD check and clean-library installation.
Deterministic core and population-structure scientific validation suites pass.
The checksum-pinned canonical real-data validation workflow executes successfully from a clean environment.
The first quantitative production baseline snapshot is complete and scientifically approved.
Required external-tool equivalence and diagnostic comparisons are executed, retained, and approved.
ADMIXTURE, fastStructure, and LEA/sNMF complete the approved real-data cross-backend validation case.
Release benchmark observations, budgets, historical comparisons, and trend evidence are retained and approved.
The source release asset set, SBOM, provenance, manifest, and checksums verify from a clean environment.
The release OCI image passes digest-based smoke tests and its SBOM/provenance evidence verifies.
The release Apptainer SIF passes clean-environment smoke tests and has an independently retained checksum.
The complete archival asset inventory is checksum-linked and independently verifiable.
A named scientific reviewer approves the complete scientific evidence set for release.
The release owner authorizes tagging, publication, deposition, and DOI assignment for this exact commit.
